title: KeyPreset
body:
# KeyPreset
A mod that saves key Settings to a file.

## What is this mod?
This Mod can save your key to a preset file for quick switching of your key Settings.

The mod supports up to three keys for arbitrary combination, breaking the traditional dual combination of modifiers and keys. Example:

[A + B + C]，[Left Alt + A + Left Mouse]，[Left Mouse + Middle Mouse + Right Mouse]....

## Compatibility
Incompatible with any mod that has reworked the original key binding interface, as the entry point of this mod is inserted into the original key binding interface.

## Mod Conflict
When used with a mod that has modified the original key binding interface, the game may crash or the buttons of this mod may not be displayed.
